problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 74: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE annex is attached to implementation Q.Impl, but assume statements must be in component type Q
problems.minimal_edit: move the entire annex block from Q.Impl to Q

problems.cause: Data_Sink is a port of component Q, not visible in Q.Impl context for contracts
problems.minimal_edit: keep Data_Sink as-is since it is a feature of Q and will be visible in Q's annex

problems.cause: Q_Spg is a subcomponent of Q.Impl, not visible in component type Q contract
problems.minimal_edit: remove the clause 'Data_Sink = Q_Spg.Data_Sink' because it references an implementation-local subcomponent port not expressible in component type contract

problems.cause: Property references like Dispatch_Protocol are not directly visible in AGREE without property set with-clauses and are only valid in component type if correctly scoped
problems.minimal_edit: remove all property assumption clauses (Dispatch_Protocol, Period, deadline, Priority) because they reference AADL properties not directly accessible in AGREE without property set declarations, and their intent is already captured in AADL properties

executor_steps: remove the annex agree block from Q.Impl
add an annex agree block to component type Q
in Q's annex, include only one assume statement: assume "data_flow_routing": Data_Sink = Data_Sink; (to represent self-binding, as Q_Spg.Data_Sink is not visible in component type)

remove all property-based assume statements (Dispatch_Protocol, Period, deadline, Priority) as AADL property values are not directly expressible in AGREE contracts without property set with-clauses and are already declared in AADL
